nodes.node_description: Configure the product catalogue — visibility, card layout, search, filters, UOM, and product tags

config.label: Show PTR
config.description: Display Price to Retailer on the product card

config.label: Show MRP
config.description: Display Maximum Retail Price on the product card

config.label: Show Margin %
config.description: Display calculated margin percentage on the product card

config.label: Max Digits — Case
config.description: Maximum digits allowed when entering case quantity (1–6)

config.label: Ordering Mode
config.description: How reps add products — one unit at a time or piece and case together

config.label: Piece Unit Label
config.description: Button label for piece ordering (e.g. Piece, Pcs, Unit)

config.label: Case Unit Label
config.description: Button label for case ordering (e.g. Case, Ctn, Box)

config.label: Max Digits — Piece
config.description: Maximum digits allowed when entering piece quantity (1–6)
